summary: The diff implements a full frontend landing page with all required image integrations. All specified images are referenced from /assets/generated/ paths in their correct sections. However, the actual image files (PNG assets) are not present in the diff — only 4 image files are listed as omitted due to limits, and no PNG files appear in the added files list. The components correctly reference all 9 required image paths, but the physical static asset files under frontend/public/assets/generated/ are not confirmed as added.

missing_requirements.requirement: All images must be served as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated — the actual PNG image files must exist at those paths.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary notes 4 files omitted due to limits for added files, and no PNG files appear in the listed added files. The components reference image paths correctly, but the physical asset files (hero-professional.dim_600x700.png, youth-group-home.dim_800x500.png, horse-interaction-1.dim_400x300.png, horse-interaction-2.dim_400x300.png, adult-day-activity.dim_500x380.png, gallery-home-1.dim_400x300.png, gallery-day-center.dim_400x300.png, gallery-community-rec.dim_400x300.png, gallery-respite.dim_400x300.png) are not confirmed as present in frontend/public/assets/generated/.

missing_requirements.requirement: Adult Day Programming section displays a photo of adults engaged in group activities using adult-day-activity.dim_500x380.png.
missing_requirements.reason: The AdultDayProgramming.tsx component is truncated in the diff and it is not confirmed that the adult-day-activity image is actually rendered in the component — the truncation cuts off before the image rendering code can be verified.
